Adhesive Plastic Sliding Discs in Gray 4 Pack (Set of 4) Add to Cart At a Glance Fully Assembled Manufactured Wood Warranty Length: 1 Year Description About This Product This octagonal coffee table makes a striking statement with its geometric silhouette and wood veneer finish. The eight-sided sculptural form serves as a focal point in living rooms, blending organic warmth (from the wood grain) with architectural edge. Sturdy enough to hold drinks, decor, or books, it complements modern, mid-century, and eclectic interiors—elevating your space from ordinary to curated. Features Octagonal Spatial Design: 8-sided silhouette fits seamlessly in corners or open areas, softening sharp room angles. Precision-cut edges create a balanced sculptural look, making it a conversation piece in gatherings. Premium Wood Veneer: Natural grain patterns (walnut/oak options) are hand-selected for consistency, with a scratch-resistant finish that withstands daily use—retaining warmth while resisting stains from coffee spills or water rings. All-Round Center Table: Spacious surface holds daily essentials like drinkware sets and decor; sturdy construction supports various items from books to plants. Rounded edges prevent bumps, safe for families with kids/pets.
